mapper.select: SELECT id, item, `key`, value, description, sort_order, is_enabled, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_dict WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, item, `key`, value, description, sort_order, is_enabled, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_dict WHERE item = #{item} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order, create_date DESC

SELECT id, item, `key`, value, description, sort_order, is_enabled, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_dict WHERE item = #{item} AND `key` = #{key} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, item, `key`, value, description, sort_order, is_enabled, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_dict WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY item, sort_order, create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_dict (id, item, `key`, `value`, description, sort_order, is_enabled, create_name, create_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{item}, #{key}, #{value}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{isEnabled}, #{createName}, #{createId})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_dict SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_dict WHERE item = #{item} AND `key` = #{key} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_dict WHERE item = #{item} AND `key` = #{key} AND id != #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
